---
title: "Dissertation Timeline"
date: "Last updated: `r format(Sys.Date(), '%B %d, %Y')`"
output:
  html_document:
    theme: flatly
    self_contained: true
    toc: false
knit: (function(inputFile, encoding) {
    rmarkdown::render(inputFile, encoding = encoding,
                      output_file = "docs/calendar.html") })
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
```

```{r milestones}
zoom_link <- "https://umass-amherst.zoom.us/j/97299985791"

# ===== EDIT MILESTONES HERE =====
milestones <- data.frame(
  date = as.Date(c(
    "2026-03-31",
    "2026-04-07",
    "2026-04-07",
    "2026-04-14",
    "2026-04-28",
    "2026-05-12",
    "2026-05-26",
    "2026-06-02"
  )),
  text = c(
    "Timeline review with Brian",
    "ûlvaro delivers complete proposal presentation to Brian",
    "Send proposed dates to committee for proposal defence",
    "ûlvaro sends chapter 1 to Brian",
    "ûlvaro sends chapter 2 to Brian",
    "ûlvaro sends chapter 3 to Brian",
    "Send full proposal to committee",
    "Dissertation proposal defence"
  ),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
# ================================

cal_start <- as.Date("2026-03-30")  # first Monday shown
cal_end   <- as.Date("2026-06-07")  # last Sunday shown

today <- Sys.Date()
```

```{r countdown, results='asis'}
future <- milestones[milestones$date >= today, ]

if (nrow(future) > 0) {
  next_m    <- future[1, ]
  days_left <- as.numeric(next_m$date - today)
  day_word  <- ifelse(days_left == 1, "day", "days")

  if (days_left == 0) {
    cat(sprintf("> **Today:** %s\n\n", next_m$text))
  } else {
    cat(sprintf("> **%d %s** until: %s\n\n",
                days_left, day_word, next_m$text))
  }
} else {
  cat("> **All milestones complete.**\n\n")
}
```

```{r calendar, results='asis'}
# Tuesday meetings (auto-generated)
tuesdays <- seq.Date(from = as.Date("2026-04-07"), to = cal_end, by = "week")
meetings <- data.frame(
  date = tuesdays,
  text = paste0("Meeting with Brian by Zoom ([link](", zoom_link, "))"),
  type = "meeting",
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

all_events <- rbind(
  data.frame(date = milestones$date, text = milestones$text,
             type = "milestone", stringsAsFactors = FALSE),
  meetings
)
all_events <- all_events[order(all_events$date), ]

week_starts <- seq.Date(from = cal_start, to = cal_end - 6, by = "week")

for (ws in as.list(week_starts)) {
  ws <- as.Date(ws)
  we <- ws + 6

  week_events <- all_events[all_events$date >= ws & all_events$date <= we, ]

  cat(sprintf("### %s \u2013 %s\n\n",
              format(ws, "%B %d"), format(we, "%B %d")))

  if (nrow(week_events) > 0) {
    for (i in seq_len(nrow(week_events))) {
      e        <- week_events[i, ]
      day_lbl  <- format(e$date, "%A, %B %d")
      if (e$type == "milestone") {
        cat(sprintf("- **%s** \u2014 %s\n", day_lbl, e$text))
      } else {
        cat(sprintf("- *%s* \u2014 %s\n", day_lbl, e$text))
      }
    }
  } else {
    cat("- *(no scheduled events)*\n")
  }
  cat("\n")
}
```

---
*Days remaining updates each time you knit.*
